description:
Fetches content from a URL and returns it as text or markdown.
- The URL must start with http:// or https://
- Format options: "markdown" (default, converts HTML to markdown), "html" (raw HTML), "text" (plain text)
- Results are truncated at 50,000 characters
- Use this to read documentation, check API responses, or research web content

url.description: The URL to fetch (must start with http:// or https://)

format.description: Return format: markdown (default), html, or text
